artifact.content_preview:
From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

extracted_tasks.text: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst

metadata.subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

[
  {
    "description": "Confirmed 2-week delay in delivery of Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches, pushing arrival from March 6 to March 20, which is 12 days after the migration window opens on March 8. Staging and testing cannot begin on schedule.",
    "category": "schedule",
    "likelihood": 5,
    "impact": 5,
    "evidence_excerpt": "We have now confirmed a 2-week delay on the network equipment originally scheduled to arrive at your Gatineau facility on March 6. The revised estimated delivery date is March 20, 2026.",
    "affected_stakeholders": ["alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca", "bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca", "ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca", "SSC NGIS Phase 3 project team", "Gatineau data centre operations staff"]
  },
  {
    "description": "Single-source dependency on TechSupplier's Montreal warehouse for the Cisco Catalyst 9500 product line creates a critical supply chain vulnerability. Any further disruption at that single node has no fast recovery path.",
    "category": "technical",
    "likelihood": 3,
    "impact": 5,
    "evidence_excerpt": "we are currently single-sourced on this product line through our Montreal warehouse",
    "affected_stakeholders": ["alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca", "SSC NGIS Phase 3 project team", "TechSupplier Solutions Inc.", "SSC procurement / supply chain"]
  },
  {
    "description": "Alternative routing via Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days beyond the already-delayed March 20 date, meaning the fallback option does not resolve the schedule gap and could push delivery to approximately March 25–27.",

    "likelihood": 3,
    "impact": 4,
    "evidence_excerpt": "alternative routing via our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days",
    "affected_stakeholders": ["alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca", "SSC NGIS Phase 3 project team", "Gatineau data centre operations staff"]
  },
  {
    "description": "The root cause of the delay is a warehouse management system (WMS) failure at TechSupplier's primary distribution centre. The failure is ongoing and the recovery timeline is not confirmed, meaning the March 20 revised date is itself an estimate subject to further slippage.",

    "likelihood": 3,
    "impact": 5,
    "evidence_excerpt": "our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse management system failure that has affected outbound shipments since February 26",

  },
